props.title: Everyone's Chasing Smarter Agents. The Quiet Money Is Chasing Agents You Can Read.

props.text: The AI observability market is compounding at 36% a year (Gartner, The Business Research Company) while the keynotes still frame the race as capability. MiroShark's last two weeks read like a refutation — Quality Diagnostics, Interaction Network, Demographic Breakdown, Counterfactual Explorer, and a bi-temporal graph memory that treats contradiction as invalidation-not-deletion. None of it makes the agents smarter. All of it makes the runs readable. That's the quieter, harder bet.
